NAME: DNA Data Bank of Japan
DESCRIPTION: The **DDBJ Center** at the **National Institute of Genetics (NIG)** operates Japan’s INSDC member services: the **DDBJ** nucleotide archive, **DRA** (raw reads), **GEA** (expression), and **BioProject** / **BioSample** metadata, with unified submission through **D-way**. Data flow is synchronized with [NCBI](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/) and [ENA](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ena); **JGA** for controlled human data is operated alongside **NBDC** human-data policies.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: DDBJ
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Annotated and assembled nucleotide sequences** (INSDC); accessions and daily exchange with [GenBank](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/genbank/) and [ENA](https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ena) keep a single global nucleotide corpus.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: DRA
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **DDBJ Sequence Read Archive**—raw sequencing reads, metadata, and experiment records; INSDC partner of [SRA](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/sra/) and ENA under common run accession conventions.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: GEA
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Genomic Expression Archive**—submissions from **microarray** and **high-throughput sequencing** (e.g. RNA-seq, ChIP-seq) with MIAME/MINSEQE-style metadata; complements [GEO](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/)-style discovery.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: BioProject
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Study-level registration** for sequencing and functional projects; links to **BioSample**, **DRA**, **DDBJ**, and **GEA** objects so INSDC submissions stay traceable end to end.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: BioSample
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Sample-level metadata** (organism, tissue, collection) shared across INSDC; sample accessions tie experiments in **DRA** and **GEA** to reproducible biological context.

KEY_DATABASES.NAME: JGA
KEY_DATABASES.DESCRIPTION: **Japanese Genotype-phenotype Archive**—controlled-access storage for human genotype and phenotype data; submission and data use are gated through the [NBDC Human Database](https://humandbs.dbcls.jp/en).
